findings.title: Frigate NVR ≤0.16.3 Blind RCE via go2rtc Exec Injection
findings.summary: Frigate NVR up to 0.16.3 is vulnerable to blind RCE through go2rtc exec injection with both authenticated and unauthenticated paths, and a full weaponized Python PoC is publicly available.

findings.title: Lanscope Endpoint Manager Path Traversal — Unauthenticated RCE
findings.summary: Lanscope Endpoint Manager On-Premises has a CVSS 9.8 path traversal allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to tamper with arbitrary files and execute code on Windows systems.

findings.title: Langflow Remote Code Execution
findings.summary: Langflow AI workflow platform has an RCE vulnerability with a public PoC, affecting commonly internet-exposed AI agent deployment infrastructure.

findings.title: OpenEMR 7.0.4 SQL Injection
findings.summary: SQL injection vulnerability in OpenEMR 7.0.4 with PoC published, affecting widely deployed internet-facing healthcare records systems.

findings.title: GitLab 18.9.1 Security Patch Release
findings.summary: GitLab released security patch 18.9.1 on February 25 addressing XSS and DoS vulnerabilities across all prior versions.

findings.title: n8n Ni8mare Unauthenticated RCE Chain
findings.summary: The n8n Ni8mare exploit has gained 222 GitHub stars with LeakIX tracking exposed instances and multiple forks appearing, indicating widespread scanner adoption.

noted.summary: DoS via GraphQL injection by authenticated user, medium severity 6.5.
Unprivileged LUKS header backup without authorization, local only, no remote vector.
New PoC on GitHub with 10 stars, details pending investigation.
MFSA 2026-13 released Feb 24 with multiple high-severity fixes including sandbox escapes, browser-only scope.
DoS in Advanced DNS Security feature, patched in 12.1.4+ and 11.2.10+, CVSS 6.6.
PAN-SA-2026-0002 Chromium monthly vulnerability update for February 2026, routine.
